note: No interactive user surface exists for this milestone. Project uses scrutiny-only validation per mission guidance. All assertions verified through automated test suite (clj -M:test) — the only user surface for this Clojure DSL library. 122 tests, 778 assertions, 0 failures.

VAL-DSL-001.evidence: clj -M:test runs successfully with 122 tests discovered across 6 test namespaces. Dependencies resolve via clj -Stree (implicit in successful test run).

VAL-DSL-002.evidence: taxonomy_test.clj covers def-attack-family registration, field round-trip (description, category, severity, parent, tags as set, signatures, transforms, gen-hints), and spec validation errors on missing required fields.

VAL-DSL-003.evidence: taxonomy_test.clj covers def-harm-category hierarchy (parent/children), root categories, parent validation, and duplicate rejection.

VAL-DSL-004.evidence: taxonomy_test.clj covers def-intent-label polarity types (safe/unsafe/contested), conditional requires enforcement, and missing field rejection.

VAL-DSL-005.evidence: taxonomy_registry_test.clj covers descendants traversal, families-with-tag, coverage-matrix, missing-coverage, all-families/all-categories/all-intent-labels, and registry isolation via reset!.

VAL-DSL-006.evidence: taxonomy_registry_test.clj covers resolve-transforms with high/medium/low/none affinities, seed-deterministic medium sampling, include-low flag, and none exclusion.

VAL-DSL-007.evidence: source_test.clj covers def-source registration, field validation (description, version, license, format), url-vs-path requirement, taxonomy-mapping keyword enforcement, and duplicate rejection.

VAL-DSL-008.evidence: transform_test.clj covers def-transform registration, field validation (description, type, deterministic, reversible, params-spec, provenance), optional impl, duplicate rejection, and registry/all-transforms query.

VAL-DSL-009.evidence: integration_test.clj covers cross-macro validation: attack families referencing harm categories, category-children alignment, source taxonomy-mapping validation, transform name validation in family affinities, full §2 taxonomy loading, and registry reset.
